subcodes.first_line: O thou who gazest upon the Most Luminous Vision! Diverse are the vistas: to one soul, the scene appeareth as a rose-garden, while to another, a heap of ashes [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ناظر بمنظر انور مناظر متفاوت یک نفس منظرش گلشن و دیگری منظرش گلخن یکی
subcodes.subjects: @the Kingdom of God [Malakut], @transcendence; unknowability of God, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
